ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is affiliated with */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League to which the team belongs */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_manager_id") REFERENCES team_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "brownlow_votes" INTEGER /* Total Brownlow votes received by the player in the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games the player played in the season */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals the player scored in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists the player made in the season */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles the player made in the season */,
  "kicks" INTEGER /* Number of kicks the player made in the season */,
  "handballs" INTEGER /* Number of handballs the player made in the season */,
  "marks" INTEGER /* Number of marks the player made in the season */,
  "hitouts" INTEGER /* Number of hitouts the player made in the season */,
  "disposals" INTEGER /* Total number of disposals the player made in the season */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds the player made in the season */,
  "inside_50s" INTEGER /* Number of inside 50s the player made in the season */,
  "clearances" INTEGER /* Number of clearances the player made in the season */,
  "clangers" INTEGER /* Number of clangers the player made in the season */,
  "frees_for" INTEGER /* Number of free kicks the player received in the season */,
  "frees_against" INTEGER /* Number of free kicks the player conceded in the season */,
  "brownlow_votes_per_game" REAL /* Average Brownlow votes per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "date_appointed" TEXT /* Date the manager was appointed */,
  "previous_club" TEXT /* Previous club the manager managed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)
